04600 
04603   class EMRCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPEN
04604   {
04605   public:
04610     EMRCREATEPEN ( PEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04615     EMRCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04619     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04620     {
04621       ds << emr << ihPen << lopn;
04622       return true;
04623     }
04627     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04633     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04634 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04635 
04638     void edit ( void ) const
04639     {
04640       printf( "*CREATEPEN*\n" );
04641       printf( "\tihPen: 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
04642 #if 0
04643       printf( "\tlopn.lopnStyle : " );
04644       switch ( lopn.lopnStyle & PS_STYLE_MASK ) {
04645       case PS_SOLID: printf( "PS_SOLID" ); break;
04646       case PS_DASH: printf( "PS_DASH" ); break;
04647       case PS_DOT: printf( "PS_DOT" ); break;
04648       case PS_DASHDOT: printf( "PS_DASHDOT" ); break;
04649       case PS_DASHDOTDOT: printf( "PS_DASHDOTDOT" ); break;
04650       case PS_NULL: printf( "PS_NULL" ); break;
04651       case PS_INSIDEFRAME: printf( "PS_INSIDEFRAME" ); break;
04652       case PS_USERSTYLE: printf( "PS_USERSTYLE" ); break;
04653       case PS_ALTERNATE: printf( "PS_ALTERNATE" ); break;
04654       }
04655 #else
04656       edit_pen_style( "lopn.lopnStyle", lopn.lopnStyle );
04657 #endif
04658       printf( "\tlopn.lopnWidth : %ld, %ld\n", lopn.lopnWidth.x, lopn.lopnWidth.y );
04659       printf( "\tlopn.lopnColor : 0x%lx\n", lopn.lopnColor );
04660     }
04661 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04662   };
04663 
04665 
04669   class EMREXTCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEPEN
04670   {
04671   public:
04676     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( EXTPEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04681     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04685     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04686     {
04687       ds << emr << ihPen << offBmi << cbBmi << offBits << cbBits << elp;
04688       return true;
04689     }
04693     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04699     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04700 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04701 
04704     void edit ( void ) const
04705     {
04706       printf( "*EXTCREATEPEN*\n" );
04707       printf( "\tihPen   : 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
04708       printf( "\toffBmi  : %ld\n",  offBmi );
04709       printf( "\tcbBmi   : %ld\n", cbBmi );
04710       printf( "\toffBits : %ld\n", offBits );
04711       printf( "\tcbBits  : %ld\n", cbBits );
04712       edit_pen_style( "elp.elpPenStyle", elp.elpPenStyle );
04713       printf( "\telp.elpWidth : %ld\n", elp.elpWidth );
04714       edit_brush_style( "elp.elpBrushStyle", elp.elpBrushStyle );
04715       printf( "\telp.elpColor : 0x%lx\n", elp.elpColor );
04716       edit_brush_hatch( "elp.elpHatch", elp.elpHatch );
04717       printf( "\telp.elpNumEntries : %ld\n", elp.elpNumEntries );
04718     }
04719 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04720   };
04721 
04723 
04726   class EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT
04727   {
04728   public:
04733     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( BRUSH* brush, HGDIOBJ handle );
04738     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04742     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04743     {
04744       ds << emr << ihBrush << lb;
04745       return true;
04746     }

04757 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04758

04762     {

04764       printf( "\tihBrush: 0x%lx\n", ihBrush );

04773 
04776   class EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW
04777   {
04778   public:
04783     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( FONT* font, HGDIOBJ handle );
04788     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04792     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04793     {
04794       // Since EMF records have to be multiples of 4 bytes, this
04795       // should perhaps be a general thing, but we know it's currently
04796       // only a problem for this structure.
04797 
04798       ds << emr << ihFont << elfw << PADDING( 2 );
04799 
04800       return true;
04801     }
04805     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04811     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04812 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04813 
04816     void edit ( void ) const
04817     {
04818       printf( "*EXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW*\n" );
04819       printf( "\tihFont: %ld\n", ihFont );
04820       printf( "\tlfHeight: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfHeight );
04821       printf( "\tlfWidth: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfWidth );
04822       printf( "\tlfEscapement: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfEscapement );
04823       printf( "\tlfOrientation: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOrientation );
04824       printf( "\tlfWeight: " );
04825       switch ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfWeight ) {
04826       case FW_DONTCARE: printf( "FW_DONTCARE\n" ); break;
04827       case FW_THIN: printf( "FW_THIN\n" ); break;
04828       case FW_EXTRALIGHT: printf( "FW_EXTRALIGHT\n" ); break;
04829       case FW_LIGHT: printf( "FW_LIGHT\n" ); break;
04830       case FW_NORMAL: printf( "FW_NORMAL\n" ); break;
04831       case FW_MEDIUM: printf( "FW_MEDIUM\n" ); break;
04832       case FW_SEMIBOLD: printf( "FW_SEMIBOLD\n" ); break;
04833       case FW_BOLD: printf( "FW_BOLD\n" ); break;
04834       case FW_EXTRABOLD: printf( "FW_EXTRABOLD\n" ); break;
04835       case FW_BLACK: printf( "FW_BLACK\n" ); break;
04836       }
04837       printf( "\tlfItalic: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfItalic );
04838       printf( "\tlfUnderline: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfUnderline );
04839       printf( "\tlfStrikeOut: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfStrikeOut );
04840       printf( "\tlfCharSet: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfCharSet );
04841       printf( "\tlfOutPrecision: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOutPrecision );
04842       printf( "\tlfClipPrecision: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfClipPrecision );
04843       printf( "\tlfQuality: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfQuality );
04844       printf( "\tlfPitchAndFamily: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfPitchAndFamily );
04845       int i = 0;
04846       printf( "\tlfFaceName: '" );
04847       while ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04848         putchar( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] );
04849         i++;
04850       }
04851       puts( "'" );
04852 
04853       i = 0;
04854       printf( "\telfFullName: '" );
04855       while ( elfw.elfFullName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FULLFACESIZE ) {
04856         putchar( elfw.elfFullName[i] );
04857         i++;
04858       }
04859       puts( "'" );
04860 
04861       i = 0;
04862       printf( "\telfStyle: '" );
04863       while ( elfw.elfStyle[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04864         putchar( elfw.elfStyle[i] );
04865         i++;
04866       }
04867       puts( "'" );
04868 
04869       printf( "\telfVersion: %ld\n", elfw.elfVersion );
04870       printf( "\telfStyleSize: %ld\n", elfw.elfStyleSize );
04871       printf( "\telfMatch: %ld\n", elfw.elfMatch );
04872       printf( "\telfVendorId: '%s'\n", elfw.elfVendorId );
04873       printf( "\telfCulture: %ld\n", elfw.elfCulture );
04874       printf( "\telfPanose:\n" );
04875       printf( "\t\tbFamilyType: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bFamilyType );
04876       printf( "\t\tbSerifStyle: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bSerifStyle );
04877       printf( "\t\tbWeight: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bWeight );
04878       printf( "\t\tbProportion: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bProportion );
04879       printf( "\t\tbContrast: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bContrast );
04880       printf( "\t\tbStrokeVariation: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bStrokeVariation );
04881       printf( "\t\tbArmStyle: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bArmStyle );
04882       printf( "\t\tbLetterform: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bLetterform );
04883       printf( "\t\tbMidline: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bMidline );
04884       printf( "\t\tbXHeight: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bXHeight );
04885     }
04886 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04887   };
04888 
04890

04949       rclBounds = *bounds;
04950     }

04956     {
04957       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
04958     }

04963     {

04965       return true;
04966     }

04977     {
04978       FillPath( dc );
04979     }

04984     void edit ( void ) const
04985     {

04987 #if 0

04989       printf( "\trclBounds.top     : %ld\n", rclBounds.top );
04990       printf( "\trclBounds.right   : %ld\n", rclBounds.right );
04991       printf( "\trclBounds.bottom  : %ld\n", rclBounds.bottom );
04992 #else

05284     {

05286       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRRESTOREDC );
05287       iRelative = n;
05288     }

05294     {

05301     {
05302       ds << emr << iRelative;
05303       return true;
05304     }

05333   class EMRSETMETARGN : public METARECORD, ::EMRSETMETARGN {
05334   public:
05338     EMRSETMETARGN ( void )
05339     {
05340       emr.iType = EMR_SETMETARGN;
05341       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSETMETARGN );
05342     }
05347     EMRSETMETARGN ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05348     {
05349       ds >> emr;
05350     }
05354     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
05355     {
05356       ds << emr;
05357       return true;
05358     }
05362     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
05368     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
05369     {
05370       SetMetaRgn( dc );
05371     }
05372 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
05373 
05376     void edit ( void ) const
05377     {
05378       printf( "*SETMETARGN*\n" );
05379     }
05380 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05381   };
05382 
05384 
05387   class PEN : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGPEN {
05388   public:
05392     PEN ( const LOGPEN* lpen )
05393     {
05394       lopnStyle = lpen->lopnStyle;
05395       lopnWidth = lpen->lopnWidth;
05396       lopnColor = lpen->lopnColor;
05397     }
05401     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PEN; }
05408     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05409     {
05410       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05411       return new EMRCREATEPEN( this, emf_handle );
05412     }
05413   };
05414

05428       elpBrushStyle = lpen->elpBrushStyle;

05487   class FONT : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public EXTLOGFONTW {
05488   public:
05492     FONT ( const LOGFONTW* lfont )
05493     {
05494       this->elfLogFont = *lfont;
05495       // There are a lot more entries in the EXTLOGFONTW structure than
05496       // the API has values for, so we invent them here
05497       memset( &elfFullName, 0, sizeof elfFullName );
05498       memset( &elfStyle, 0, sizeof elfStyle );
05499       elfVersion = ELF_VERSION;
05500       elfStyleSize = 0;
05501       elfMatch = 0;
05502       elfReserved = 0;
05503       memset( &elfVendorId, 0, sizeof elfVendorId );
05504       elfCulture = ELF_CULTURE_LATIN;
05505       memset( &elfPanose, 1, sizeof(PANOSE) );
05506     }
05510     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_FONT; }
05517     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05518     {
05519       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05520       return new EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW( this, emf_handle );
05521     }
05522   };
05523 
05525 
05528   class PALETTE : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGPALETTE {
05529   public:
05533     PALETTE ( const LOGPALETTE* lpalette )
05534     {
05535       (void)lpalette;
05536       palVersion = 0;
05537       palNumEntries = 0;
05538       PALETTEENTRY zero_entry = { 0, 0, 0, 0 };
05539       palPalEntry[0] = zero_entry;
05540     }
05544     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PALETTE; }
05551     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05552     {
05553       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05554       return new EMRCREATEPALETTE( this, emf_handle );
05555     }
05556   };
05557 
05559 
05565   class METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT : public OBJECT {
05573     void init ( const RECT* size, LPCWSTR description_w ) {
05574 
05575       // Evidently, metafile handles are numbered from 1, so don't
05576       // ever use 0.
05577 
05578       handles.push_back( true );
05579 
05580       // Keep some of our graphics state in a header record
05581 
05582       header = new ENHMETAHEADER ( description_w );
05583       records.push_back( header );
05584 
05585       // Compute the size and position of the metafile on the "page"
05586 
05587       if ( size ) {
05588         update_frame = false;
05589 
05590         header->rclFrame.left = size->left;
05591         header->rclFrame.top = size->top;
05592         header->rclFrame.right = size->right;
05593         header->rclFrame.bottom = size->bottom;
05594 
05595         header->rclBounds.left =
05596           size->left * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05597         header->rclBounds.top =
05598           size->top * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05599         header->rclBounds.right =
05600           size->right * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05601         header->rclBounds.bottom =
05602           size->bottom * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05603       }
05604       else {
05605         update_frame = true;
05606 
05607         header->rclBounds.left = -10;
05608         header->rclBounds.top = -10;
05609         header->rclBounds.right = 10;
05610         header->rclBounds.bottom = 10;
05611 
05612         header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
05613           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05614         header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
05615           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05616         header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
05617           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05618         header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05619           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05620       }
05621 
05622       // Some default graphics state (are they really, though?)
05623 
05624       SIZEL default_resolution = { RESOLUTION, RESOLUTION };
05625       resolution = default_resolution;
05626       SIZEL default_viewport_ext = { 1, 1 };
05627       viewport_ext = default_viewport_ext;
05628       POINT default_viewport_org = { 0, 0 };
05629       viewport_org = default_viewport_org;
05630       SIZEL default_window_ext = { 1, 1 };
05631       window_ext = default_window_ext;
05632       POINT default_window_org = { 0, 0 };
05633       window_org = default_window_org;
05634 
05635       min_device_point = viewport_org;
05636       max_device_point = viewport_org;
05637 
05638       pen = (PEN*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_PEN | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05639       brush = (BRUSH*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_BRUSH | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05640       font = (FONT*)globalObjects.find( DEVICE_DEFAULT_FONT | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05641       palette = (PALETTE*)globalObjects.find( DEFAULT_PALETTE|ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05642 
05643       text_alignment = TA_BASELINE;
05644       text_color = RGB(0,0,0);
05645       bk_color = RGB(0xff,0xff,0xff);
05646       bk_mode = OPAQUE;
05647       polyfill_mode = ALTERNATE;
05648       map_mode = MM_TEXT;
05649 
05650       handle = globalObjects.add( this );
05651     }
05652 
05653   public:
05657     ::FILE* fp;
05662     DATASTREAM ds;
05666     ENHMETAHEADER* header;
05670     std::vector< EMF::METARECORD* > records;
05671 
05672     // Keep a small set of graphics state information
05673     SIZEL resolution;           
05674     SIZEL viewport_ext;         
05675     POINT viewport_org;         
05676     SIZEL window_ext;           
05677     POINT window_org;           
05678     bool update_frame;          
05679     POINT min_device_point;     
05680     POINT max_device_point;     
05681     POINT point;                
05682     PEN* pen;                   
05683     BRUSH* brush;               
05684     FONT* font;                 
05685     PALETTE* palette;           
05686     UINT text_alignment;        
05687     COLORREF text_color;        
05688     COLORREF bk_color;          
05689     INT bk_mode;                
05690     INT polyfill_mode;          
05691     INT map_mode;               
05692 
05698     std::vector< bool > handles;
05699 
05705     std::map< HGDIOBJ, HGDIOBJ > emf_handles;
05706 
05717       METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( FILE* fp_, const RECT* size,
05718                               LPCWSTR description_w )
05719         : fp(fp_), ds( fp_ )
05720     {
05721           init( size, description_w );
05722     }
05727     virtual ~METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( )
05728     {
05729       // Purge all the metarecords (if there are any) {this include the
05730       // header record, too}
05731       if ( records.size() > 0 )
05732         deleteMetafile();
05733     }
05737     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT; }
05742     DWORD nextHandle ( void )
05743     {
05744       for ( unsigned int i = 1; i < handles.size(); i++ ) {
05745         if ( !handles[i] ) {
05746           handles[i] = true;
05747           return i;
05748         }
05749       }
05750       handles.push_back( true );
05751 #if 0
05752       // So, the number of handles is equal to largest ever handle value
05753       header->nHandles = handles.size()-1;
05754       return header->nHandles;
05755 #else
05756       // Well, it appears that even StockObject handles count for something.
05757       // Not sure what the right value here is, then.
05758       header->nHandles = handles.size();
05759       return handles.size()-1;
05760 #endif
05761     }
05765     void clearHandle ( DWORD handle )
05766     {
05767       handles[handle] = false;
05768     }
05774     void appendRecord ( METARECORD* record )
05775     {
05776       records.push_back( record );
05777 
05778       header->nBytes += record->size();
05779       header->nRecords++;
05780     }
05786     void appendHandle ( METARECORD* record )
05787     {
05788       records.push_back( record );
05789 
05790       header->nBytes += record->size();
05791       header->nRecords++;
05792     }
05797     void deleteMetafile ( void )
05798     {
05799       for ( std::vector<METARECORD*>::const_iterator r = records.begin();
05800             r != records.end();
05801             r++ ) {
05802         delete *r;
05803       }
05804       records.clear();
05805     }
05810     void mergePoint ( const LONG& x, const LONG& y )
05811     {
05812       POINT p;
05813       p.x = x;
05814       p.y = y;
05815       mergePoint( p );
05816     }
05821     void mergePoint( const POINT& p )
05822     {
05823       POINT device_point;
05824 
05825       // *** Note, it's possible for the global transformation matrix to
05826       // affect this too. ***
05827 
05828       device_point.x = (LONG)( (float)( p.x - window_org.x ) / window_ext.cx *
05829         viewport_ext.cx + viewport_org.x );
05830 
05831       device_point.y = (LONG)( (float)( p.y - window_org.y ) / window_ext.cy *
05832         viewport_ext.cy + viewport_org.y );
05833 
05834       // If the user didn't specify a bounding rectangle in the constructor,
05835       // compute one from this data, too.
05836       if ( device_point.x < min_device_point.x ) {
05837         min_device_point.x = device_point.x;
05838         if ( update_frame ) {
05839           header->rclBounds.left = min_device_point.x - 10;
05840           header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
05841             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05842         }
05843       }
05844       else if ( device_point.x > max_device_point.x ) {
05845         max_device_point.x = device_point.x;
05846         if ( update_frame ) {
05847           header->rclBounds.right = max_device_point.x + 10;
05848           header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
05849             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05850         }
05851       }
05852 
05853       if ( device_point.y < min_device_point.y ) {
05854         min_device_point.y = device_point.y;
05855         if ( update_frame ) {
05856           header->rclBounds.top = min_device_point.y - 10;
05857           header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
05858             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05859         }
05860       }
05861       else if ( device_point.y > max_device_point.y ) {
05862         max_device_point.y = device_point.y;
05863         if ( update_frame ) {
05864           header->rclBounds.bottom = max_device_point.y + 10;
05865           header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05866             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05867         }
05868       }
05869     }
05870   };
05871 
05872 } // close EMF namespace
05873 
05874 #endif /* _LIBEMF_H */
Generated at Sun Jan 27 18:56:07 2002 for EMF by 1.2.8.1 written by Dimitri van Heesch, © 1997-2001
